rows.label: qev041202_MSG0001
rows.name: Oh, you're here, you miserly bastard.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041202_MSG0002
rows.name:
Muhahaha~ Thank you for your
continued patronage-mo~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041202_MSG0003
rows.name:
Got an order from the leader. Carry
today's goods all the way to the back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041202_MSG0004
rows.name:
Hm? You've brought someone
unfamiliar with you today.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041202_MSG0006
rows.name:
Now that takes some guts! Did
you go out of your way to
come here and get killed?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041202_MSG0008
rows.name:
This person is my business assistant...
or rather a chore runner... Umm,
they're like an underling-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041202_MSG0009
rows.name:
Physical labor has been getting
tough recently, so I found someone
who looked poor and hired them-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041202_MSG0010
rows.name:
They aren't anyone grand enough to
be an enemy of the Bias, so please
overlook them just this once-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041202_MSG0013
rows.name:
Hah! You've moved up in
the world, haven't ya![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041202_MSG0014
rows.name:
If it's a measly wimp like that, I
suppose I can let 'em off the hook.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041202_MSG0015
rows.name:
But even if I let 'em pass here, who knows
what'll happen once they're inside?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041202_MSG0016
rows.name:
Muhaha. They're already well aware
that they're taking full
responsibility for themselves-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041202_MSG0017
rows.name:
U-umm, anyway, today I need to
carry the goods to the back-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041202_MSG0018
rows.name:
Let's get this finished nice and
quick-mo! Pardon the intrusion-mo~![ST:wait ]
